steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Title the finding with specific vulnerability name and affected component
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for finding write-up template
steps.expected_output: Descriptive title identifying exact vulnerability and affected system

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Assign severity rating using CVSS scoring and qualitative risk assessment
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: CVSS score with severity level (Critical, High, Medium, Low)

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Write concise 2-3 sentence description of the vulnerability and attack vector
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: Clear vulnerability description understandable to technical and non-technical readers

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Explain business impact clearly showing potential damage and risk
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: Business context explaining real-world consequences of vulnerability

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Document step-by-step reproduction instructions for verification
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: Numbered steps allowing independent vulnerability reproduction

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Include annotated screenshots showing vulnerability exploitation
steps.expected_output: Visual proof-of-concept with highlighted critical elements

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Provide specific remediation recommendations with implementation guidance
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Actionable remediation steps with configuration examples
